PREDICATES:
bald_eagle(x) ::: x is a bald eagle
rough(x) ::: x is rough
bear(x) ::: x is a bear
needs_bear(x) ::: x needs the bear
is_blue(x) ::: x is blue
is_nice(x) ::: x is nice
eats(x, y) ::: x eats y
is_cold(x) ::: x is cold

PREMISES:
forall x (bald_eagle(x) -> NOT rough(x))
forall x (bear(x) -> NOT needs_bear(x))
forall x (dog(x) -> needs_bear(x))
forall x (rough(x) -> eats(x, bald_eagle()))
forall x (needs_bear(x) -> NOT is_blue(x))
forall x (is_nice(x) -> eats(x, bald_eagle()))
forall x (is_cold(x) -> eats(x, bear()) -> rough(x))
forall x (eats(x, bear()) -> needs_bear(x) -> NOT eats(x, bald_eagle()))
forall x (is_cold(x) -> is_nice(x) -> eats(x, bald_eagle()))
forall x (needs_bear(x) -> eats(x, bald_eagle()))

CONCLUSION:
needs_bear(dog())

bear(x) ::: x is a bear

blue(x) ::: x is blue
nice(x) ::: x is nice

cold(x) ::: x is cold
eat(x, y) ::: x eats y

PREMISES:
forall x (NOT bald_eagle(x) -> NOT rough(x))
NOT needs(bear(), bald_eagle())
needs(dog(), bear())
forall x (rough(x) -> chase(x, bald_eagle()))
forall x (needs(x, bear()) -> NOT blue(x))
forall x (nice(x) -> chase(x, bald_eagle()))
forall x (eat(x, bald_eagle()) -> rough(x))
forall x (cold(x) -> chase(x, bear()) -> rough(bear()))
forall x (eat(x, bear()) -> needs(x, bear()) -> NOT eat(bear(), bald_eagle()))
forall x (cold(x) -> nice(x) -> eat(x, bald_eagle()))
forall x (needs(x, bear()) -> eat(x, bald_eagle()))

CONCLUSION:
needs(bear(), bald_eagle())
